compiled_state.title: GREEN: Wire preconditions-validator.sh into preplanning SKILL.md entry gate and exit emit
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Requirement
Modify preplanning/SKILL.md to make T3's structural tests pass GREEN.

## Implementation Notes
Add two new instruction sections to plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md:

### Section 1 — Preconditions Entry Gate (add near top of Phase 1, before Step 1)
Heading: "### Preconditions Entry Gate (/dso:preplanning)"
Content: Instruction block that tells the LLM to:
1. Resolve the epic's ticket_id from the invocation argument
2. Run: bash "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh" <epic_id> brainstorm [--event-file=<path if known>]
   OR call _read_latest_preconditions(epic_id, "brainstorm") to find the event file, then validate it
3. If the validator exits 0 (valid): continue to Phase 1 Step 1
4. If the validator exits 1 (invalid schema): BLOCK with diagnostic:
   "PRECONDITIONS_GATE_BLOCKED: preplanning entry requires a valid brainstorm PRECONDITIONS event.
    Run /dso:brainstorm <epic-id> first, which emits the event via preconditions-record.sh.
    Diagnostic: <validator stderr output>"
5. If the validator exits 2 (not found — no brainstorm PRECONDITIONS event exists for this epic):
   BLOCK with diagnostic:
   "PRECONDITIONS_GATE_BLOCKED: no PRECONDITIONS event found for brainstorm stage on epic <epic_id>.
    Run /dso:brainstorm <epic-id> first to emit the required event."
Note: This gate is fail-open when Story 1 (preconditions-record.sh) has not yet been deployed —
if the validator script itself is not found (command not found), emit a WARN and proceed.
This prevents the validator from self-blocking on its own absence.

### Section 2 — Preconditions Exit Emit (/dso:preplanning)
Heading: "### Preconditions Exit Emit (/dso:preplanning)"
Content: Instruction block at the SKILL_EXIT breadcrumb section (before the exit breadcrumb):
1. Run: bash "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/preconditions-record.sh" <epic_id> preplanning_complete <session_id> <worktree_id> minimal
   This emits the preplanning PRECONDITIONS event (Story 1's writer)
2. Self-verification (roundtrip check): Run the validator on the just-written event:
   bash "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh" <epic_id> preplanning --self-verify=<event_file_path>
3. Chain verification: The just-written event includes an upstream_event_id field referencing
   the brainstorm event's event_id (passed to preconditions-record.sh as a data field)
4. If self-verification fails: emit WARN (non-fatal — do not block exit)
   "PRECONDITIONS_SELF_VERIFY_WARN: preplanning exit event failed roundtrip schema check — event written but may be malformed"

Note on depth-agnostic contract:
Include a comment in the instruction block: "This validator reads only minimal-tier fields.
Future standard/deep additions are ignored, not rejected (depth-agnostic forward-compat contract)."

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md (add two sections)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] preplanning/SKILL.md contains a "### Preconditions Entry Gate" (or equivalent) section heading
  Verify: grep -q 'Preconditions Entry Gate\|Preconditions.*Entry.*Gate\|Entry Gate.*Preconditions' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] preplanning/SKILL.md references preconditions-validator.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'preconditions-validator.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] preplanning/SKILL.md contains a "### Preconditions Exit Emit" (or equivalent) section heading
  Verify: grep -q 'Preconditions Exit Emit\|Preconditions.*Exit.*Emit\|Exit.*Emit.*Preconditions' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] preplanning/SKILL.md references preconditions-record.sh in the exit section
  Verify: grep -q 'preconditions-record.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Depth-agnostic contract note is present in the entry gate section
  Verify: grep -q 'depth-agnostic\|depth_agnostic\|unknown fields.*ignored\|ignored.*unknown fields' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] All 3 structural tests in tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh pass GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-gate.sh
- [ ] Skill file passes check-referential-integrity.sh (no dead path references introduced)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/scripts/dso validate.sh --ci 2>&1 | grep -v 'WARN\|SKIP' | tail -5
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
